title: Cast value to integer gives wrong result
poc: select cast(cast(0.98 as double) as integer);
key_bug_features: Casting decimal values to integer produces incorrect results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_casting (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, decimal_value DECIMAL(5, 2), int_value INTEGER);
UPDATE test_casting SET int_value = CAST(decimal_value AS INTEGER);
SELECT id, decimal_value, int_value FROM test_casting WHERE int_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT CAST(CAST(decimal_value AS DOUBLE) AS INTEGER) FROM test_casting WHERE decimal_value IS NOT NULL;
